memory.summary: I planned the assignment but now cohort_3 invites lunch. My social value is high, so I'll join them and finish work later.

desires: Ensure the analysis section is polished and error-free before 18:00 so I don't have to scramble or ask for extensions later.
Avoid looking uncommitted or 'too serious' by fully engaging in lunch with cohort_3, even though it drains energy.

goals.description: Finalize and proofread the analysis section to ensure zero errors before 18:00.
goals.rationale: Academic perfectionism (value=achievement) dictates avoiding last-minute scrambling; delaying this risks a grade penalty which outweighs social comfort.

goals.description: Attend lunch with cohort_3 despite energy drain, but keep interactions brief and low-friction.
goals.rationale: Social engagement is necessary for cohesion but currently high-cost relative to my low energy; I will attend only to maintain trust without fully committing emotionally or physically.

agent.last_reasoning: Achievement priority dictates zero-error completion before 18:00 to avoid grade risk. I'll finish the analysis now; attending lunch briefly later preserves trust without draining energy further.
